commit.subject: LU-5242 tests: DEBUG ONLY obd exports after every test
commit.message:
LU-5242 tests: DEBUG ONLY obd exports after every test

Since LU-5242 fails with excessive obd_exports, this patch checks that
number after every test run to see when they get out of hand.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly mdtfilesystemtype=zfs mdsfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs testlist=runtests,sanity
Test-Parameters: fortestonly mdtfilesystemtype=zfs mdsfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs testlist=runtests,sanity
Test-Parameters: fortestonly mdtfilesystemtype=zfs mdsfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs testlist=runtests,sanity
Test-Parameters: fortestonly mdtfilesystemtype=zfs mdsfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs testlist=runtests,sanity
Test-Parameters: fortestonly mdtfilesystemtype=zfs mdsfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs testlist=runtests,sanity
Signed-off-by: Nathaniel Clark <nathaniel.l.clark@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ie3f2015da8485f524651d389c2657acfa0f7d014
